msgs.text:
According to the attached history document from 2026-06-28, Turn 107 is another attachment-only continuation. The three required current-turn attachments are present, and I did not use File Library material.

Turn 107 — attachment-only idempotence remains closed

The state remains unchanged from Turn 106:(THEOREM_STATE,MEASURED_CERTIFICATE_D_STATE)=(ΓS≅GΓH, NO_MEASURED_INPUT).The theorem coordinate remains closed. The attached sweep records the stronger F=P⋊G-level statement:∃Φ:F→F continuous over GwithΦ(rS−1)=rH.

Since rS and rS−1 generate the same closed normal subgroup of F, this descends to

F/⟨⟨rS⟩⟩F≅G

F/⟨⟨rH⟩⟩F,i.e.ΓS≅GΓH.This is exactly the over-G isomorphism requested in the problem statement: an isomorphism Φ:ΓS→ΓH satisfying πH∘Φ=πS.

The frozen proof chain remains:H1 -Nielsen equivalence+residual restricted-Lie induction+normalized Koszul–Witt coefficient induction+D.1–D.4+finite filtered Nielsen compactness⟹ΓS≅GΓH.The compactness step is still the corrected filtered-Nielsen one: for coefficient-and-degree truncations PN,J, the finite solution sets consist of filtered Nielsen/cocycle data; finite Frattini gives finite over-G automorphisms; compactness gives a compatible inverse-limit automorphism Φ:F→F; and intersecting all PN,J gives Φ(rS−1)=rH.The measured-certificate coordinate also remains unchanged. The current attachments are still only the prompt, problem statement, and history ledger. They do not include genuine object-level nonlinear Certificate D artifacts: no measured D.1–D.4 scripts, matrices, pivot tables, or measured-output logs. Therefore the strict Certificate D gate remains

NO_MEASURED_INPUT,not PASS, not FAIL, and not REJECTED_AS_LEDGER_DERIVED. The history explicitly separates the theorem-level conclusion from the external measured-output gate: the theorem state remains ΓS≅GΓH, while publication-grade reproducibility still requires genuine measured nonlinear Certificate D artifacts.

So no Magnus tower, coefficient tower, degree-16 case, A2 -layer, t-layer, or Certificate D subcase should be reopened under the current attachment-only input. The invariant state is:history/problem/prompt only⟹(ΓS≅GΓH, NO_MEASURED_INPUT).

ESTABLISHED: Turn 107 is idempotent under the same attachment-only conditions as Turn 106. The theorem coordinate remains ΓS≅GΓH, via an over-G automorphism Φ:F→F satisfying Φ(rS−1)=rH. The measured Certificate D coordinate remains NO_MEASURED_INPUT.

GAP: No structural mathematical gap is reopened. The only remaining gap is external reproducibility: no genuine object-level measured nonlinear D.1–D.4 artifacts are attached in this turn.

NEXT: Keep the obstruction sweep closed. The only valid next move is to attach genuine measured D.1–D.4 scripts, matrices, pivots, or measured-output logs not derived from the history, then run the strict gate as PASS or FAIL.[TURN107-ATTACHMENT-ONLY-IDEMPOTENT-GATE]
